title: AEO Basics: What Is AEO?
description: Learn Answer Engine Optimization for AI search visibility.
content:
AEO = Answer Engine Optimization. Structure content so AI engines (Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT) extract discrete answers.

Key AEO tactics?

Question-led headings, direct-answer opening paragraphs, FAQ blocks, definition callouts.

Why AEO matters?

Without AEO structure, even well-optimized content fails the extraction test.

title: FAQ Structure for AEO
description: How to write FAQs that AI engines extract.
content:
FAQ blocks are critical for AEO. Write question + short direct answer.

FAQ format?

Q: What is SEO?
A: SEO is Search Engine Optimization for Google rankings.
